title: This Is an Extremely Long Title That Should Definitely Be Truncated Because It Exceeds Any Reasonable Limit for a Cover Slide
subtitle: And the subtitle is also ridiculously long to test whether the text fitting logic properly handles overflow situations in the composition pipeline without breaking the layout
keyFacts: First key fact that is somewhat long and verbose to test truncation behavior in the caption builder
Second key fact with extra details that nobody really needs but helps test edge cases thoroughly
Third key fact for good measure and to ensure bullet points render correctly even with long text
Fourth key fact because we want to hit the maximum of four allowed bullets in the caption output
Fifth key fact that should be excluded since buildCaption only takes the first four entries from keyFacts
